title: Docs: Checkboxes that don't cross out

posts.author: AlexTechnical (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m making a doc template. I’d like to have some checkboxes that aren’t tasks to do, but rather a way of indicating an attribute of the doc.

For example, I might have a box labeled Technical Standard, or one labeled Include Committee Approval.

These are boxes that you don’t check when something is DONE. You check them to give some further yes/no information for reference.

But any checkbox that I put in the doc (or the template in this case), when it’s checked, the item is crossed out, to indicate “Done”.

I’d like checkboxes that can be checked without crossing out the text.
